text:
Now I have all the data. Let me also check whether the `validate_command` references in `plugins/src/lib.rs` are actually for the same function or a different one.

The `validate_command` hits in `plugins/src/lib.rs` are all `validate_command_entries`, `validate_command_entry`, and `validate_command_path` -- completely different functions, not calls to `bash_validation::validate_command`.

Let me also verify `fork_managed_session` more carefully since I only got one hit.
